features.featureTitle: Fix the crash/error in `frontend/src/pages/hr/AddEmployeePage.tsx` that occurs when the HR Admin clicks the 'Add Staff' button on the staff management page. Investigate and resolve all runtime errors including: null/undefined actor access before initialization, type mismatches on the `directManagerId` field or manager dropdown data, missing or broken form field bindings, unhandled promise rejections from the `createEmployeeWithAccount` (or equivalent) mutation, and any broken imports or missing component references. The form must open and render without errors, all fields (including the Direct Manager dropdown and Username/Password fields) must populate correctly, and submission must complete without throwing an unhandled exception.
